rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Application For An Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt, Fines, Incacerationa Nd Sacntions Against Defts For Refusing To Comply With The Court'S Dec-17-13 Order ;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 18, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF CAITLIN FITTING, GLORIA GUTIERREZ, EDWARDO GUTIERREZ Notice Of Application And Application For An Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt, Fines, Incarceration and Sacntions Against Defendants For Refusing To Comply With The Court'S Dec-17-13 Order. Hearing required to address whether Court has jurisdiction on Contempt hearing. The stay order remains in force. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ETHEL H. ROSS AS TRUSTEE OF THE ETHEL HILL ROSS VS. CLAUDE ALIX BERTRAND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Rescission Of Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 18, 2013, line 5. (part 3 of 3) DEFENDANT CLAUDE BERTRAND Notice Of Rescission Of Settlement Agreement. DENIED. Defendant failed to carry his burden to show that Plaintiff fraudulently induced Defendant into entering the settlement agreement, did not make any repairs, and have not attempted in good faith to make the repairs; and that Defendant gave a prompt notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ETHEL H. ROSS AS TRUSTEE OF THE ETHEL HILL ROSS VS. CLAUDE ALIX BERTRAND et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 18, 2013, line 5. (part 1 of 3) PLAINTIFF ETHEL H. ROSS AS TRUSTEE OF THE ETHEL HILL ROSS 1998 Trust MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. GRANTED. Plaintiff carried its burden and showed that Defendant breached the Stipulation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARY LEE, TRUSTEE FOR DONALD LEE BYPASS TRUST VS. PAULE WEBER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 18, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT PAULE WEBER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. "3 Day Notice" asserts more bases for eviction than addressed in the Demurrer, e.g. #1 and #2. = (501/REQ)
